title: Fizz's Shotgun
description: Replaces the crossbow model with a shotgun
body:
# **Fizz's Shotgun**
## Shotgun in game
![Shotgun in game](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExM3JtZ24zZmNudTIzM3N3Mmg4b2NvMjBqYzF0amZuYmV2cDkxbDdhbiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/eMTZZcMOz06S7ee7Ro/giphy.gif)

## [This project is also on Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fizz-shotgun)
## _ENG_
A simple resource pack that replaces the crossbow's model and sounds with a shotgun.

## _RUS_
Простой ресурспак, заменяющий модель и звуки арбалета на модель и звуки дробовика.
